name: Valkyr Prime
description: A proud fighter emerges unscarred by time or malice. Featuring altered mod polarities allow for greater customization.
passiveDescription: Valkyr accumulates Rage when hitting or killing enemies with melee weapons, increasing her Melee Damage up to |PERCENT|%. Taking fatal damage when the Rage meter is above |CONSUME|% consumes the meter, preventing death and granting |DURATION|s of invulnerability.

abilities.name: Rip Line
abilities.description: Valkyr hurls forth a hook and pulls herself to whatever it hits. If it hits an enemy, nearby foes are pulled in as she unleashes a coordinated Melee attack.

abilities.name: Warcry
abilities.description: Valkyr lets out a rallying cry that bolsters Armor and Attack Speed for allies while in <AFFINITY_SHARE>Affinity Range.

abilities.name: Paralysis
abilities.description: Unleash a damaging blast, slowing its victims while increasing their Melee Damage Vulnerability.

abilities.name: Hysteria
abilities.description: Valkyr bares her deadly claws, unleashing devastating attacks that also heal her. Valkyr becomes immune to Status Effects and her Armor bonus from Warcry is multiplied while using the claws.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A proud fighter emerges unscarred by time or malice. Featuring altered mod polarities allow for greater customization.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Valkyr Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Valkyr Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Valkyr Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes:
Was: Affected enemies are pulled towards Valkyr and the stun duration is increased by 200%. 
The pull strength now scales with distance from Valkyr 
meaning enemies are now pulled close to Valkyr instead of colliding or flying past her. 
Fixed Valkyr’s Augment Mod Swing Line not working when casting directly above the player.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Valkyr (Ceres to Jupiter)
Added a max active time of 10s to the Valkyr Specter’s Hysteria ability.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes: If you were standing in its beam attack, the damage you receive would be astronomical, even at lower levels (Level 10 Legatus enemies could down a full health Valkyr in one beam attack). What was happening is that the Legatus would be dealing multiple instances of damage instead of constant single tick. This has now been resolved, so there should be no one hit wonders.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a noticeable seam in the torso/arm area of the Valkyr Carnivex Skin.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.1
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed the Valkyr Carnivex Skin and Collection giving the default Valkyr animation sets and not the Valkyr Carnivex animation sets.
A script will be run to deliver these to the accounts that purchased the Skin before this hotfix. If you did not previously own the default Valkyr animation sets, they are yours to keep! 
Fixed Emblem offset issues with the Valkyr Carnivex Shoulder armor.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
Valkyr Carnivex Collection 
Ferocity meets dangerous elegance with this Valkyr Deluxe Collection. Paralyze enemies with a brutal mix of metal and muscle with a new Valkyr Deluxe Skin created by concept artist Liger. Rip and tear in high-fashion with a complimentary Deluxe Fist Melee Skin, Armor Set, and Valkyr Deluxe Animation Sets all available from the in-game Market.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.changes:
Right now, using a Forma on a Warframe (or Archwing/Necramech) requires you to start from 0 when it comes to Abilities you can use. Furthermore, you only get the first Rank of your First ability. Take Valkyr for instance. You install a Forma, and you’re back to only casting unranked Rip Line!
Our change will make it so your Mastery Rank impacts how much you have unlocked by default on Forma use. Following our Valkyr example, with this change, a Mastery Rank 10 player would have all of her abilities unlocked upon applying a Forma to her, albeit not at their full strength!
you know by the time you’ve levelled your Valkyr on Hydron to 10, you unlock Hysteria. We are making your Mastery Rank ‘match’ those milestones, so to speak, with the end goal being a Mastery Rank 30 player can use Forma without ever having to be locked out of Abilities. Simply put, the higher your Mastery Rank, the higher the baseline of your gear when using Forma.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Valkyr’s Rip Line animation being broken.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes:
Valkyr Prime, Venka Prime, and Cernos Prime Relics 
We’ve permanently Unvaulted Nyx/Valkyr Prime and their accompanying Prime weapons in Corpus Railjack! Find their Relics in new Corpus Railjack Derelict Freightlinkers, Ice Mines, and Orokin Shield Derelicts! As well as in Grineer Point of Interest rewards!

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Valkyr Talons
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Valkyr's Bastet Helmet to make certain metal areas the proper untintable dark that matches the rest of the Helmet. It still won't be tintable but it should now match the correct color channel. As reported here.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to gain Energy from Energy Restores after using Valkyr’s Hysteria.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 27.5.6 + 27.5.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Valkyr’s Enraged Hysteria Augment now has a 1 time Energy cost of 50 instead of draining Energy over time. This also allows you to gain Energy while it's active!

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Hotfix 27.5.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a script error when deactivating Valkyr’s Hysteria with the Enraged Augment equipped.
Fixed script error that could occur when joining a mission in progress with a Valkyr using the Enraged Augment.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: Banshee, Excalibur Umbra, Frost, Nekros, Nova, Nyx, Saryn, Valkyr, and Zephyr Ability videos have been added to their respective Arsenals!

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas, Frost, Valkyr, Nidus, and Oberon's left arm bending in an unsettling way when holding the Opticor with their Noble Animation Sets equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Prime Vault 26.0.8 + 26.0.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Saryn Prime and Valkyr Prime, as well as their signature Prime Weapons, Accessories, have reentered the Prime Vault and have been removed from the drop tables.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed braid on the back of the Valkyr Leonessa Helmet clipping through her head.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.6.3
patchlogs.changes: When Creator Mode is enabled, the email field will now be soft locked to prevent accidentally typing your ‘ValkyrIsB3stG1rl’ password into your email field. You now must click the new lock icon to turn off the lock. If you attempt to click the email field while it’s locked, the lock icon will pulse to remind you to unlock it first.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.1

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.changes:
Increased Valkyr’s Hysterical Assault Augment Mod max Range from 30m to 40m.
Fixed Valkyr’s Hysterical Assault Augment Mod having broken functionality with Melee 2.99997 due to the removal of Secondary Fire in Melee mode. Now Aiming + Melee will trigger the leap function while in Hysteria. The Mod description has been updated to reflect this new mechanic.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Valkyr’s Hysteria accumulated damage not being reset upon recast.
Fixed Valkyr Spectre at the Ceres >Jupiter Junction causing a hitch when she uses Hysteria.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.5

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.8.0 + 23.8.0.1 + 23.8.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability to trigger Exodia Arcanes on Exalted Melee weapons. Exodia Arcanes still apply to Zaws, just not in Exalted Melee (Excalibur, Valkyr, etc) form.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed using a Warframe with an Exalted Melee weapon (Excalibur, Wukong or Valkyr), certain actions will lead to a weird "in-between" state, where your Exalted Melee Stance incorporates moves from your currently equipped melee weapon.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lith T2 Relic having 2 Braton Prime Blueprints as a reward (1 common and 1 uncommon). We replaced the common reward with the Valkyr Prime Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes: Valkyr/Prime’s Talons

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Warframe Specters are now much smarter! If you don't recall, Specters are craftable gear you can equip to summon an AI companion in battle. We've done a general intelligence pass on their proficiency with Weapons, and we've also updated their power-casting logic. Virtually every power is now castable with only a few exceptions! Specters CANNOT cast the following Abilities: Vauban's Minelayer, Ivara's Zipline, Titania's Razorwing, Nekros’ Desecrate and Shadows of the Dead, Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Valkyr’s Hysteria, Wukong’s Primal Fury, Cloud Walker, and Defy, Atlas’ Petrify and Tectonics, Limbo's entire kit (save for the damage aspect of Banish), and finally Zephyr’s Dive Bomb.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Cryona Syandana sitting too high on Valkyr, Valkyr Prime, and Valkyr Gersemi Skin.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.2.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a stretched mesh on the Valkyr Delusion Skin. 
Fixed Syandanas not sitting properly on the Valkyr Delusion Skin.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.1.2

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0
patchlogs.changes:
Valkyr Delusion Skin by prosetisen
Valkyr Ion Helmet by Yatus

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.8 + 21.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Clients downed while using Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Wukong’s Primal Fury, or Valkyr’s Hysteria would be unable to switch weapons when revived.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed casting and deactivating Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Wukong’s Primal Fury, or Valkyr’s Hysteria while in Dual-Wield mode resulting in the UI stating the name of your Pistol and ability used.
Fixed a script error when casting Valkyr’s Rip Line.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow

Corpus featured in the Valkyr Prime trailer now reflect the new facial feature textures in-game. 
Moved Valkyr Prime's Channelling FX to a different tint channel so they show up much better.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.7.1
patchlogs.changes: The Health Conversion Mod now activates upon taking damage instead of getting hit. Previously, Warframes (like Valkyr, Rhino or Nezha) that have abilities that make themselves invincible to damage, were consuming the conversion when hit even though no damage was being done due to invincibility. This rendered the Health Conversion Mod rather useless, and has since been changed to improve functionality.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Friendly Archwing markers, Atlas, Rhino, Valkyr’s custom HUD and Inaros’ resurrect HUD are now affected by the HUD scaling sliders in the Interface options.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.2.0

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0

Valkyr

patchlogs.changes: ensuring no enemies are in the range of Valkyrs Hysteria Aura (20 meters max, they have to be able to see you), or you will take the damage. How you choose to dispose of these enemies is up to you
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed being able to use your weapon ultimate (Excalibur, Valkyr, etc.) endlessly without Energy consumption.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Valkyr’s Paralysis will no longer be able to stun boss-type enemies.
Valkyr’s Warcry now has diminishing returns against boss-type enemies.
Valkyr’s Ripline now has a 0.5x energy multiplier per successive hit.
Fixed Warframes with ‘alternate weapon’ ultimates (i.e. Valkyr, Excalibur, etc) not properly earning Focus when using these Warframe-specific weapons.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an error allowing Valkyr to pull player out of the extraction area as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/575698-valkyrs-rip-line-pulls-players-out-of-extraction-area/

patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an error preventing players from using their weapons or abilities after using Ivara, Valkyr or Excalibur’s 4th Ability Power.
Fixed an error that would prevent Clients from being able to use their powers as Valkyr, Wukong, Ivara or Excalibur if meleeing while their 4th Ability Power was ending, or being deactivated due to a Nullifier bubble.

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Valkyr's Prolonged Paralysis pulling enemies significantly farther than intended.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.additions: Gersemi Valkyr Skin: Before Alad V, before the experiments, there was Gersemi Valkyr.  This unique Skin will only be available for 14 days.
patchlogs.changes:
Valkyr has received the following changes to her Ability powers:
Valkyr’s HUD will now display the window of opportunity to recast Ripline at lower cost .
Valkyr now passively has 50% knockdown recovery speed and no heavy landing.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Excalibur and Valkyr not receiving credit for kills from Exalted Blade and Hysteria respectively.
Fixed Valkyr’s Ripline showing as castable with 0 Energy.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.5
patchlogs.additions: New Noggles are now available in the Market!  Add Oberon, Valkyr and Zephyr to your collection today!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Added Apex particles to Banshee’s Push and Valkyr’s Paralysis.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.1

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Valkyr's Warcry slow on enemies has been reduced in PvP.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Valkyr’s Warcry stacking multiple times on Squad members when Eternal War Augment is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Valkyr’s Hysteria playing sounds from related to the player’s un-equipped melee weapon.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.3
patchlogs.changes: The Removal Of Arcane Enhancements On Nekros’ Mortos Syandana And Valkyr’S Bonds Is Now Live, And Any Attached Arcanes Have Been Returned To Your Inventory. As Stated In Hotfix 16.5.2, This Change Is Due To Nekros And Valkyr Having An Unfair Advantage Over Other Warframes By Having One Additional Arcane Slot.:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.2
patchlogs.changes: The Nekros Mortos Syandana and Valkyr Bonds can no longer be Enhanced. This change is due to Nekros and Valkyr having an unfair advantage over other Warframes by having one additional Arcane slot. We're going to be removing Arcanes off these two attachments, and running a script to compensate players so the Enhancements can be used on intended Syandanas. We will notify everyone when this script has started.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Arrow skins and Nekros & Valkyr’s unique attachments not using the player’s custom colors.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.additions: Warframes can now use Warframe-specific dangles at the same time as other Syandanas. This new option is available under Auxiliary, in the Arsenal's Attachments.  (Morthos Syandana or Valkyr's Bonds + Syandana)
patchlogs.changes: Valkyr is now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1

patchlogs.name: Mesa Update
patchlogs.changes: Updated Valkyr’s Prolonged Paralysis Mod to leave enemies stunned on the ground, open to execution attacks.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a scaling issue seen with Valkyr’s ambient visual effects during Archwing missions.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a bug that was incorrectly scaling Syandanas down on Banshee, Nova and Valkyr by 20%. This should address some physics issues with Syandanas on these Warframes too.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where not equipping a melee weapon while using Valkyr would break Hysteria.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.10.3
patchlogs.changes: Parry procs can now be triggered during Valkyr’s Hysteria.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Valkyr’s Hysteria finisher animations using Furax animations.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.6.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Note how I now have stats on what the results are of ranking up Valkyr’s Hysteria through fusion.
Fixed an issue with Valkyr’s Warcry armor buff not properly being removed after the ability ends.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Reduced the duration of Valkyr's Hysteria in Dark Sector conflicts.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a common Furax stance card appears in the combos list for Valkyr while Hysteria is active.
Fixed Valkyr’s Hysteria not functioning properly if a player picked up a data mass while Hysteria is active.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Valkyr's Hysteria not properly respecting the level of the associated Stance, making combos unusable.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes:
Hysteria has been reworked with an entirely new animation set and sounds! Activate Valkyr’s Hysteria to play through the new combos and movement set!
Valkyr’s Hysteria now is affected by the melee ‘combo’ counter bonuses! The higher your combo chain, the more damage Hysteria will do!
Tweaked the Bow Idle animations on Loki, Mag, Valkyr, and Hydroid Warframes.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with primary color tint on Valkyr’s Kara helmet.

Tweaked the visuals on Valkyr's Immortal Skin.
Adjusted the positioning of Chest Armor on Ember, Banshee, Valkyr, Zephyr, Vauban, Saryn, and Nyx.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Improved the description for Valkyr's War Cry mod to better indicate melee buffs to teammates.

patchlogs.name: 13.4.0: Serro + Psa!
patchlogs.fixes:
Tweaked the placement of Valkyr's shoulder armor attachments.
Fixed an issue with Valkyr's Default Helmet lacking an image and description.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the ability and energy visuals on numerous Warframes including Rhino, Frost, Nova, Ash, Banshee, Zephyr, Vauban, Volt and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.6+13.0.7+13.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with clients breaking after attempting to perform a melee attack after Valkyr's Hysteria has ended.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Fixed alternate helmets for Valkyr, Banshee, and Saryn missing from the market.

patchlogs.name: Update 13: Dark Sectors
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ragdolls being affected by Valkyr's powers.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ‘Rank 30 Furax’ bug appearing if using Hysteria and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.4.0
patchlogs.additions: ·         Grineer Shipyards tile set revealed with new “Hijack” game mode & Tethra’s Doom event!·         New Prime items in the Void!    Rhino Prime    Ankyros Prime    Boltor Prime    AkBronco Prime·         2x new Alternate helmets (Valkyr, Oberon)·         New Corpus Crewmen voices are here! They now have their own language and a whole new style as voted by the Design Council!

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: 4x Immortal Skins: Nekros, Valkyr, Oberon, and Ember!

patchlogs.name: Update 12: Zephyr Rises
patchlogs.changes:
Valkyr now has 600 base armor.
Valkyr’s Hysteria ability now takes weapon damage and crit into consideration.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes:
Valkyr’s Ripline is now more violent on AI.
Fixed the enemy speed debuff on Valkyr's Warcry ability, so that it is now affected by Ability Mods.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Valkyr’s Warcry being permanent on enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.1.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Valkyr's Warcry not slowing enemies down more at higher levels
Fixed Alad V being too weak to Valkyr’s Ripline.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Valkyr’s power sounds not playing when using Noble animations.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.3: Hotter Than Ruk’S Guns!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed melee weapon info at end of match not being displayed if Valkyr’s Hysteria was active.
Fixed melee getting locked for clients after being hit by something that would normally do knockdown when Valkyr's Hysteria is active.
Fixed Valkyr using the fist melee style on her regular melee weapon after using her ultimate.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Valkyr BP image being Banshee.
Fixed Valkyr Cosmetic Restraints not being in Valkyr Bundle.

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.additions: New Warframe: “Valkyr” Female Berserker Class, Cosmetic Bastet Helmet & Cosmetic Restraints!https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K-jH6mP37_k
